title: Autonomous loop execute-safe refresh scratch status after proof v0
problem: Ticket-342 surfaces autonomous_loop_scratch_status in operator autocycle JSON, but execute-safe mode returns pre-run scratch inspection only; after a successful autonomous loop proof the payload should re-read autonomous_loop_report.json.
acceptance_criteria: After successful execute-safe autonomous loop proof, payload autonomous_loop_scratch_status reflects the written report.
Failed or blocked execute-safe runs leave pre-run scratch status unchanged.
No execute-safe command allowlist changes or queue writes.
rollback_plan: Revert post-run scratch re-inspection in execute_safe_checks only.
